_comment: Configuration for generate_thorne_logo_atlas.py. Each column applies a different lighting technique to the source logo. Transparency rows then fade all columns uniformly.

output._comment: Updated in-place (same file). 255x255 atlas, 40px cells, 2px gaps.

lighting_columns._comment: Each column applies a different lighting technique. Modes: source, flat, radial_glow, top_light, radial_top_bias, rim_light. All modes use target_gray as the brightening target.

columns._comment: Original logo, no effect — dark baseline
Center glow with 45% top bias — directional warmth with radial core
Center bright, edges dark — inner fire radiating from the dragon
Strong underlight — dark crown, bright tail. Mirror of top_light.
Strong overhead light — bright crown, deep dark tail
Edges glow, interior stays dark — backlit silhouette halo

transparency_rows._comment: Alpha values for each row (1-6). Row 1 is fully opaque (255). Rows 2-6 reduce opacity. Same levels as the button atlas for consistency.
